title: A swimming competition
description: For each question, write the correct answer. Write one word for each gap.

content.text: My local sports centre organised a swimming competition last weekend, and I decided to enter for the first time. I had been practising regularly (27) several months, so I felt reasonably prepared. On the day of the competition, there were far more people there (28) I had expected, and everyone looked nervous. Before my race began, my coach reminded me to concentrate (29) my breathing and stay calm. The water felt colder than usual, but I tried not to think about it too much. When the race started, I swam as quickly as I could and finished third. I was pleased (30) my result because the other swimmers were very experienced. Afterwards, my friends congratulated me and said I had improved a lot (31) the previous year. Although I did not win, I still enjoyed taking part (32) the event.
